data.name: The Queen of Phalli
data.detailed_description:
QOP is an interactive erotic novel, a story-driven text based experience with branching choices, 200+ handpainted illustrations, and a focus on sinful reading and decision-making.

  • Deep Narrative Immersion: Over 200.000 handwritten words, waiving a story that seeks balance between character development, plot, and overly abundant sexual content.

  • Overly abundant sexual content: Elifael will not limit her escapades to her mentor and housemates. Throughout her journey, she will meet exotic and fascinating creatures such as gnomes, goblins, centaurs, and even humans.

  • Beautiful Hand-Drawn Artwork: Each and every one of the over 200 illustrations in the game has been carefully and lovingly painted by a human hand.

  • Branching Choices: Elifael must fight for her sisters' affection and respect. Yet only one path can be walked at a time, so choose carefully.

  • Complex, Mature Themes: The society of the realms below is an alien and bizarre world, where everything is about sex except for sex. Sex is about power.

  • Multiple Endings: Will Elifael stay true to her faith or her heart? Will she choose a sister over the other, or will she be the glue holding her family together? Will she endure the baptism or will she lose everything along the way? You decide.

Story

In the dark depths of the realms below, power and status depend on passion and promiscuity. It is a world of wonders where only women dwell and the priestesses of the Queen of Phalli rule unmatched.

Young Elifael El'Naar must prepare for her Baptism, a perilous ceremony to prove her loyalty to her House and devotion to the Goddess. Should she succeed, she will have taken her first step to becoming a priestess herself. Should she fail, she may lose her status and even her mind.

Characters

Elifael is the youngest of the three protegées under the tutelage of Matron Sipriina El'Naar. She is not as bright or devout as her senior Nefail, nor as beautiful and seductive as her senior Synafae. She is kind-hearted but naive. She still has much to learn about the world and upholds the creed of the Goddess without really understanding it.

First Sister of House El'Naar and already a priestess for nearly a century and a half. At first sight, Nefail is a paragon of everything a representative of the Goddess should be: beautiful, powerful, insatiable. And yet there is much turmoil beneath her stern face and cold glare. She wishes to protect her junior housemates, even if that means being strict. The Path of Perpetual Pleasure is not for the faint of heart.

Of all the novices preparing for the transformation into a priestess, Synafae may be the most promising. The Goddess blessed her with unparalleled beauty, charm, and unquenchable sexual appetite. She is Elifael's first love, and Matron Sipriina's pride and joy. And yet, despite all these great expectations, the ritual is dangerous, even to those who are best prepared. The lingering fear she might fail haunts all those who care for her.

Over 800 years old and standing 2,83 metres in high heels, Sipriina is Matron to House El'Naar and mentor to the three El'Naar girls. Her status grants her enormous powers, metaphorical and literal, but also entails grave burdens and responsibilities. Her many duties keep her from being the parent she wishes to be. Worse yet, being a conduit for the Goddess is taxing for the soul. Her existence is a constant struggle between the desire to be a good mentor and an ever-growing, all-consuming lust.

data.short_description: Step into a FUTA world where power is forged through passion. Guide Elifael El'Naar through the dangers of the Baptism, that she may prove herself to Goddess and Matron. Will she win over the affection and respect of her kin, or fall into disgrace and ruin? Your choices shape her fate.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 64-bit with SSE3 support
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: -
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: -
  • 處理器: -
  • 顯示卡: -
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS Big Sur 11
  • 處理器: x64 or Apple M
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: -
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

建議配備:
  • 作業系統: -
  • 處理器: -
  • 顯示卡: -
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 64-bit Ubuntu 18.04+, Debian 10+, openSUSE 15.5+, or Fedora Linux 39+
  • 處理器: 64-bit with SSE3 support
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: -
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
